notes: Runs perfectly. There are some micro freezes, maybe because of shaders being compiled, but runs great. One issue I have is that mouse doesn't usually work when starting the game, and I have to alt-tab and go back to the game. After that the mouse works perfectly.
title: Dead Rising 4

notes: Played for about 20 minutes, game launched and ran no problems. Some stuttering due to caching, but it was quick and the fps was locked to 60 at 1440p max.
title: Dead Rising 4

notes: Played ca 20 to 30 min trough the DLC no issue found just some shuttering in the beginning.
title: Dead Rising 4

notes: I had scored this game at silver before because the mouse did not work. With the latest version of proton this seems to be fixed.
title: Dead Rising 4

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
I tried with and all variants of:
- kernel 4.20, and my current 5.1, 
- "PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE": "1",
- "PROTON_OLD_GL_STRING": "1",
- "PROTON_NO_ESYNC": "1",
- "PROTON_USE_WINED3D": "1",
- "PROTON_USE_WINED3D": "1",

The game shows a black little window and then exits.
title: Dead Rising 4
